summary: Added 8 Codeberg star CTAs to /compare page — one per tool comparison section (7) plus primary button in bottom CTA section. Deployed via Capistrano to ralphworkflow.com with all gates passing.

locations: Bottom CTA (primary button restructured to 'Star on Codeberg' as first call)
what_changed.cta_format: ⭐ Star on Codeberg — [unique value prop per section], link to https://codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow with rel external noopener

deploy_gates.http_verify: 200 OK, 8 'Star on Codeberg' hits confirmed on live page

decision_rationale.why_this_action: All distribution lanes structurally blocked (SMTP missing, Apollo Cloudflare-blocked, PYPI_TOKEN missing, Reddit/HN/Lobsters blocked at runtime). Conversion path improvement is the highest-leverage autonomous action: the compare page tells visitors what Ralph Workflow adds vs 7 competitors but gives zero path to find the repo. Every comparison section now ends with a unique Codeberg CTA.
decision_rationale.why_not_elsewhere: StackOverflow in cooldown. Curator email lane blocked on SMTP. Apollo blocked on Cloudflare. PyPI blocked on token. Owned content saturated at 41 posts. Directory lane confirmed to never produce backlinks (audit). Publisher contacts only expose non-runtime-executable channels.
